name: cat-prep-hub
description: Full-stack CAT prep app — React + Node.js + Python AI

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "AI,API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
